steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says a monarch's reign "cannot be understood without... the factors that allowed the monarch to ______ his right to hold the throne successfully." The blank is a verb meaning to claim or state one's right openly, in the context of establishing legitimacy.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — assert: means to state or claim with confidence — asserting a right to the throne is exactly how a monarch establishes legitimacy. ✓
  • Choice B — annotate: means to add notes or commentary — you annotate a text, not a claim to a throne. ✗
  • Choice C — reciprocate: means to return a gesture or favor — does not fit claiming or defending a right to rule. ✗
  • Choice D — disengage: means to withdraw or detach — the opposite of actively claiming the throne. ✗
A is correct.
